scenes.title: The Forgotten Meeting
scenes.emotional_beat: Frantic energy, comedic panic with an undercurrent of actual stress
scenes.summary: CHARACTER_A and CHARACTER_B discover a critical meeting was double-booked — and they're already 10 minutes late. Their contrasting approaches to the crisis (hyperprepared vs. improvise-at-speed) clash hilariously but somehow produce a result.

scenes.title: Night Office
scenes.emotional_beat: Quiet dread. The kind that builds when you're alone and have too much time to think.
scenes.summary: CHARACTER_A stays late. She finds an old letter in the printer tray. It's addressed to her. She reads it alone. Someone appears at the door before she can process it.

scenes.title: The Confrontation
scenes.location: A neutral café, the next morning
scenes.emotional_beat: Two people talking about everything except the actual problem.
scenes.summary: CHARACTER_B knows something is wrong. CHARACTER_A refuses to say. They have an entire conversation using subtext and coffee orders as emotional proxies. The scene ends with nothing resolved but everything said.
